name: Skibidi Toilet Wars
description: Are you ready for the Battle of Skibi Toilets? Fight for world domination in space with Skibidi Toilet. This game is a single player game. You and Your Opponent Have 3 Hits. And the one with 0 Right to Hit is defeated. So your goal in the game is to hit the opponent 3 times. Have fun!
instructions: Change Character Direction with Mouse To play again you must right click on the Play Again button
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Arcade, Arena, Battle, Best, endless, Fight, Fighting, Gun, Shoot, Shooting, Skibidi Toilet, Space
